1: <!doctype html>
2: <html lang="zh-CN">
3: <head>
4: <meta charset="UTF-8">
5: <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
6: <title>Daily Dashboard · Kindle PW4</title>
7: <style>
8: /* ─── Reset ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
9: *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
10: html{font-size:16px;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}
11: body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Helvetica Neue","Noto Sans","PingFang SC","Microsoft YaHei",system-ui,sans-serif;
12:   background:#fafafa;color:#1a1a1a;width:100vw;height:100dvh;overflow:hidden;
13:   -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;margin:0}
14: a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
15: 
16: /* ─── Container — 4-column unified grid ──────────────────── */
17: .dashboard-wrapper{position:fixed;inset:0;overflow:hidden;background:#fafafa}
18: .dashboard{width:100%;height:100%;display:grid;
19:   grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
20:   grid-template-rows:minmax(160px,22vh) 1fr minmax(120px,17vh) minmax(40px,7vh);
21:   gap:clamp(8px,1.3vmin,14px);
22:   padding:clamp(8px,1.3vmin,14px);
23:   box-sizing:border-box}
24: 
25: /* Grid area assignments */
26: .col-time-weather{grid-column:1/3;grid-row:1}
27: .col-calendar{grid-column:3/5;grid-row:1}
28: .schedule-panel{grid-column:1/3;grid-row:2}
29: .habits-panel{grid-column:3/4;grid-row:2}
30: .countdown-panel{grid-column:4/5;grid-row:2}
31: .pomodoro-card{grid-column:1/3;grid-row:3}
32: .meditation-card{grid-column:3/5;grid-row:3}
33: .row-4{grid-column:1/5;grid-row:4}
34: 
35: /* ─── Row 1: Time+Weather (left half) + Calendar (right half) ─── */
36: .col-time-weather{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ececec;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;gap:24px;align-items:center}
37: .tw-time{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
38: .tw-divider{width:1px;height:90px;background:#eee;flex-shrink:0}
39: .tw-weather{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
40: .col-calendar{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ececec;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 18px 10px}
41: 
42: /* Clock */
43: .clock-time{font-size:clamp(30px,7.5vw,72px);font-weight:500;letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1;color:#111;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
44: .clock-ampm{font-size:20px;font-weight:400;color:#8a8a8a;margin-left:6px;vertical-align:super}
45: .clock-date{font-size:16px;color:#6e6e6e;margin-top:6px;letter-spacing:0.02em}
46: .clock-weekday{display:inline-block;background:#f0f0f0;color:#4a4a4a;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;
47:   padding:2px 10px;border-radius:3px;margin-left:8px;vertical-align:middle}
48: 
49: /* Weather */
50: .weather-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
51: .weather-icon{font-size:40px;line-height:1}
52: .weather-temp{font-size:clamp(22px,4.5vw,44px);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-0.01em;color:#111;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
53: .weather-unit{font-size:18px;color:#8a8a8a;vertical-align:super;margin-left:2px}
54: .weather-desc{font-size:14px;color:#6e6e6e;margin-top:2px;letter-spacing:0.02em}
55: .weather-hl{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-top:10px;font-size:13px;color:#888}
56: .weather-hl span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
57: .weather-location{font-size:11px;color:#aaa;margin-top:8px;letter-spacing:0.02em}
58: 
59: /* Calendar */
60: .cal-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px}
61: .cal-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#333;letter-spacing:0.04em}
62: .cal-nav{display:flex;gap:6px}
63: .cal-nav button{background:#f5f5f5;border:1px solid #eee;border-radius:4px;width:32px;height:32px;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer;color:#555;

140: 
141: /* ─── Row 3: Pomodoro + Meditation ─────────────────────── */
142: .pomodoro-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ececec;border-radius:8px;padding:clamp(6px,1vmin,14px) clamp(10px,1.8vmin,20px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-height:0}
143: .meditation-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ececec;border-radius:8px;padding:clamp(6px,1vmin,14px) clamp(10px,1.8vmin,20px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-height:0}
144: .timer-label{font-size:clamp(9px,1.2vmin,11px);font-weight:600;color:#999;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:2px;flex-shrink:0}
145: .timer-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:clamp(6px,1.2vmin,16px);flex:1;min-height:0}
146: .timer-display{font-size:clamp(20px,3.8vh,48px);font-weight:350;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;letter-spacing:-0.02em;color:#111;font-family:"Helvetica Neue",-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0}
147: .timer-controls{display:flex;gap:clamp(4px,0.8vmin,8px);flex-shrink:0;flex-wrap:wrap}
148: .timer-btn{background:#f5f5f5;border:1px solid #e5e5e5;border-radius:5px;padding:clamp(4px,0.8vmin,8px) clamp(8px,1.4vmin,16px);font-size:clamp(10px,1.3vmin,12px);font-weight:500;color:#444;cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;letter-spacing:0.03em;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;min-height:28px;white-space:nowrap}
149: .timer-btn:hover{background:#eaeaea;border-color:#d5d5d5}
150: .timer-btn.primary{background:#1a1a1a;color:#fff;border-color:#1a1a1a}
151: .timer-btn.primary:hover{background:#333}
152: .timer-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
153: .timer-btn.active-timer{background:#c0392b;border-color:#c0392b;color:#fff}
154: .timer-btn.active-timer:hover{background:#a93226}
155: .timer-status{font-size:clamp(9px,1.2vmin,11px);color:#999;margin-top:2px;letter-spacing:0.02em;flex-shrink:0}
156: .timer-sessions{font-size:clamp(9px,1.2vmin,11px);color:#bbb;margin-top:1px;letter-spacing:0.02em;flex-shrink:0}
157: 
158: /* Timer presets (shared) */
159: .timer-presets{display:flex;gap:clamp(3px,0.6vmin,6px);margin-bottom:2px;flex-shrink:0;flex-wrap:wrap}
160: .timer-preset{background:#f5f5f5;border:1px solid #eaeaea;border-radius:4px;padding:clamp(3px,0.6vmin,6px) clamp(6px,1vmin,12px);font-size:clamp(9px,1.2vmin,11px);color:#666;cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;min-height:24px;white-space:nowrap}
161: .timer-preset:hover{background:#eaeaea}
162: .timer-preset.active{background:#1a1a1a;border-color:#1a1a1a;color:#fff}
163: 
164: /* ─── Row 4: Inspiration ────────────────────────────────── */

(Showing lines 140-164 of 819. Use offset=165 to continue.)
</content>
